limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No quantified AI-specific spend, headcount, or named vendor/cloud/chip partnerships disclosed in the excerpts; language is generic and aspirational regarding AI investment.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Named use cases (products, services, internal processes) are mentioned but no deployment status metrics or quantified results are provided; score reflects named initiatives without operational detail.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present (business section contains risk factor language); multiple company-specific risk mechanisms are described (IP infringement, misuse by employees/third parties, competitive obsolescence, cybersecurity amplification by AI) with operational impact pathways, but no quantification or named governance/oversight bodies are disclosed.
